description: Color event photograph. Inside an aircraft-carrier interior space (exposed gray overhead pipes, ducts, and bulkhead, with a child's fish and aquarium mural faintly painted on the wall at left), an older man in a dark navy business suit and light-blue mask (the Hon. Rahm Emanuel, U.S. Ambassador to Japan, per the tweet) shakes hands with a new citizen: a young Navy sailor in dress blues wearing a black mask and holding a white certificate folder embossed with a seal. A woman in a plaid coat and mask is at right and another masked guest is in the background. It is a natural-light color photograph with no overlaid slogan text or graphic design and no visible watermark. Per the tweet, this is a naturalization ceremony for service members and dependents held aboard the USS Ronald Reagan.
